data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Drops Below 3,900 USDT with a 6.78% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Sep 25, 2025, 17:20 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 3,900 USDT and is now trading at 3,898.5 USDT, with a narrowed 6.78% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Glassnode: Bitcoin falls below profit-taking range, and may fall to the $9-105,000 support range
data.description: Glassnode posted on the X platform that Bitcoin has fallen below a key risk band that typically signals profit-taking. A re-entry into this range would signal renewed market strength; a failure to recover would likely lead to a decline to the support range of approximately $90,000-105,000.

data.title: The U.S. SEC and CFTC announced the topics and participants of the joint roundtable meeting on regulatory coordination.
data.description: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) officially announced the agenda and participants of the joint roundtable meeting on regulatory coordination with the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) on September 29. It is reported that the main topics include discussing the relationship between the SEC and CFTC, how regulatory coordination can release the economic value of the platform while continuing to protect investors, and how regulatory coordination can increase choices for market participants and reduce costs for investors. Former CFTC Chairman J. Christopher Giancarlo, Director of the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission's Division of Trading and Markets Jamie Selway, and others will attend the meeting.

data.title: Kalshi outpaces Polymarket after pair feature in South Park episode
data.description:
South Park's new episode mocked prediction markets Polymarket and Kalshi and their power-hungry advisor, Donald Trump Jr.
source: https://protos.com/kalshi-outpaces-polymarket-after-pair-feature-in-south-park-episode/

data.title: Prediction market Melee raises $3.5 million in funding, with participation from Variant and others
data.description: Prediction market Melee announced a $3.5 million funding round, with participation from Variant, DBA, and a group of angel investors. The company reportedly draws on successful examples like Polymarket to allow users to create prediction markets on any topic. Its core mechanism achieves decentralized pricing by rewarding early, accurate traders, unlike the traditional model that relies on professional market makers. (CoinDesk)

data.title: US Senator Warren calls for investigation into Trump family's overseas cryptocurrency transactions
data.description: Elizabeth Warren, a Democratic member of the U.S. Senate, called for an investigation into the Trump family's overseas cryptocurrency transactions. (Jinshi)

data.title: CZ: Reachme's performance has fallen short of expectations. We recommend that projects explore token issuance after achieving product-market fit.
data.description: Binance co-founder CZ posted on the X platform that he also made mistakes in project judgments, such as Reachme's performance not meeting expectations. Without tokens, projects are more likely to fail. However, he always urged project founders not to issue tokens too early, and to explore issuing tokens only after product-market fit.

data.title: Hong Kong was once again ranked as the world's freest economy, and ranked third globally in "sound currency" and "regulation."
data.description: The Fraser Institute of Canada released its "Economic Freedom of the World 2025" report, which continues to rank Hong Kong as the world's freest economy. Among the five key assessment categories, Hong Kong retained its top spot in "International Trade Freedom" and also ranked third globally in "Sound Currency" and "Regulation." (CCTV News)

data.title: The official Twitter account of the Meme coin GIGGLE is suspected of being stolen, and its market value has fallen below $10 million, with a daily drop of over 60%.
data.description: According to GMGN data, the official X account for the Meme coin GIGGLE was suspected of being hacked. As a result, its market capitalization briefly plummeted below $10 million, currently trading at $9.5 million, a daily drop of over 60%. Odaily reminds users that Meme coin prices are subject to significant volatility, so investors should be aware of the risks.

data.title: Plasma distributed $8,390 worth of XPL tokens to all users who participated in the ICO pre-deposit program.
data.description: Plasma distributed $8,390 worth of XPL tokens for free to all users who participated in its ICO pre-deposit program, even if they didn't ultimately purchase tokens through the ICO. Plasma said that within three hours of its mainnet beta launch, half of the ICO participants had claimed their tokens. (Decrypt)

data.title: CleanSpark Secures $100 Million Bitcoin Credit Line from Two Prime
data.description: According to PRNewswire, US Bitcoin mining company CleanSpark (NASDAQ: CLSK) has secured a $100 million Bitcoin-collateralized credit facility from Two Prime. This financing brings CleanSpark's total collateralized credit facility to $400 million, providing the company with additional non-dilutive capital to accelerate data center growth. The funds are expected to support the deployment of Bitcoin mining computing capacity and investments in high-performance computing (HPC) capabilities.

data.title: Ethereum co-founder Jeffrey Wilcke deposited 1,000 ETH into Kraken
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, Ethereum co-founder Jeffrey Wilcke (0x8215c2d3a838cbb18c4033417d18970fd9758524) deposited 1,000 ETH worth $4 million to Kraken with the intention of selling it.

data.title: KuCoin appeals FINTRAC's decision, calling for clearer and fairer regulation
data.description: KuCoin announced today that it has filed an appeal against the recent decision of the Financial Transactions and Reports Analysis Centre of Canada (FINTRAC) to uphold its violation notice and impose a substantial fine. KuCoin claims the company was not designated as a "foreign money services business," that the fine is excessive and punitive, and that it will appeal the decision to the Federal Court of Canada, as per its legal rights. KuCoin CEO BC Wong emphasized that this move is intended to safeguard the rights of the company and its users and promote a clearer and fairer regulatory environment. During the appeal process, KuCoin will continue to operate transparently, protect user assets, and keep the community informed of progress.

data.title: Trump-appointed Steve Miran doubles down on calls for aggressive rate cuts from the Fed
data.description:
Donald Trump’s first Federal Reserve appointee, Steve Miran, is once again pressing for deep rate cuts, saying current monetary policy is now too tight and getting tighter by the day. In a lengthy interview aired on Bloomberg, Steve said he wants the Fed to cut rates by 125 to 150 basis points this year, warning […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/steve-miran-calls-for-aggressive-rate-cuts/

data.title: Ethereum Price Crash: $36.4M Liquidation Sparks Fear of More Losses
data.description:
The recent crash in Ethereum's price has led to a staggering $36.4 million worth of liquidations, raising significant concerns among investors and analysts alike about the potential for even greater losses in the cryptocurrency market. As traders scramble to assess the situation, the fear of further declines looms large, prompting discussions about the underlying factors contributing to this sudden downturn and its implications for the future of Ethereum and other digital assets.
source: https://blocknews.com/ethereum-price-crash-36-4m-liquidation-sparks-fear-of-more-losses/

data.title: Spark integrates PayPal USD into its stablecoin lending markets
data.description:
PayPal has teamed up with Spark to boost PYUSD liquidity, with deposits already topping $135 million on the decentralized finance (DeFi) lending protocol.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/spark-paypal-usd-stablecoin-lending-markets?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Fed's Goolsbee: Stable Rates Amid Inflation Equals Rate Cut
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Federal Reserve official Austan Goolsbee stated that maintaining stable interest rates during periods of rising inflation is equivalent to a rate cut. This perspective highlights the Fed's approach to managing economic conditions without immediate changes to interest rates.
